entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the host crop being studied for infection.

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT
entities.description: Phaeoisatiopsis personata, the fungal pathogen causing leaf spot in groundnut.

entities.name: WEATHER
entities.description: Environmental factors that influence the infection process.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: A specific weather parameter affecting the infection of groundnut by late leaf spot.

entities.name: LEAF WETNESS
entities.description: A specific weather parameter affecting the infection of groundnut by late leaf spot.

entities.name: INFECTION
entities.description: The process of a pathogen establishing itself in a host plant.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crop Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, where experiments were conducted.

entities.name: SIMPLE MODEL
entities.description: A proposed model to describe the effects of temperature and leaf wetness on infection.
